Unreported Opinions Index

Return to Main Directory of Unreported Appellate Opinions

The opinions posted on this page are UNREPORTED. An unreported opinion may not be cited in any paper, brief, motion, or other document filed in the Supreme Court, the Appellate Court, or any other Maryland Court as precedent within the rule of stare decisis. However, an unreported opinion issued on or after July 1, 2023 may be cited for its persuasive value, but only if no reported authority adequately addresses the issue before the court. Md. Rule 1-104. Note: An unreported per curiam opinion may not be cited either for precedential or persuasive authority.

Unreported opinions filed from May 1, 2015 to present are available through the Main Directory of Unreported Appellate Opinions. For opinions filed prior to May 1, 2015, only a reference to the decision is available. Copies of unreported opinions filed prior to May 1, 2015 are available from the Clerk's office.

CLICK ON THE DOCKET NUMBER OF A CASE TO GO TO THE OPINION.

Court Filed Docket File Term Judge Appellant Appellee
